title: Ballaadi
actors: Maaria Eira, Thure Bahne, Arvi Tuomi
plot: At the request of the author Zacharias Topelius, Fredrik Pacius begins composing an opera, inspired by a summer walk in Backas, Espoo. Pacius becomes infatuated with Ebba Duncker, who sings by the lake like a nightingale from a yo...
